title: vaccinium uliginosum var. pubescens
intro: Vaccinium uliginosum var. pubescens, also known as dwarf bilberry or bog bilberry, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to Arctic and sub-Arctic regions. This plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium uliginosum var. pubescens include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Vaccinium uliginosum var. pubescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams, preserves, and other culinary applications.
